networks.name: Yazing
networks.notes: Secondary discovery platform. 100% commission pass-through model; commission funded by Priority's program budget.

commission.notes: 5% on all sales. No tiered, bonus, or seasonal rate structure detected. Unchanged across all 2026 audit cycles (6th consecutive).

affiliate_program.shipping: Same business day on orders before 12:00 noon ET

creative_assets.notes: No self-serve public creative library. Priority team available to assist with marketing content. AvantLink dashboard provides banners, product feeds, and deep links to approved affiliates.

affiliate_program.approval_requirements: Active website or social channel with original outdoor/recreation content; coupon/rebate/deal-aggregator sites not accepted; manual review via AvantLink

product_catalog.key_differentiator: Low-maintenance Gates Carbon belt drive (rust-free, grease-free) across all models
product_catalog.flagship_ebike: Priority Current Plus E-Bike (750W mid-drive motor, electronic shifting, ~$3,299)

vs_benchmark.commission: at_median — 5% matches category median; Velowave (7-10%) and Velotric (7%) remain structurally above for e-bike content creators
vs_benchmark.cookie: below_median — 21 days vs. 30-day category standard; 6th consecutive audit cycle with zero movement
vs_benchmark.aov: below_median on standard line (~$550 avg); well above_median on e-bike line (~$3,299 Current Plus = ~$165 EPC)

afare_signals.commission_note: At category median (5%). No improvement trend. Competing e-bike programs (Velowave 7-10%, Velotric 7%) are materially more lucrative for e-bike-focused creators.
afare_signals.cookie_note: 21-day cookie — now 6 consecutive audit cycles below the 30-day category standard. High-consideration bicycle purchases routinely span multiple research sessions; the attribution gap is a compounding deterrent for sophisticated affiliates. Escalation recommended.
afare_signals.aov_note: Standard bike AOV ~$550 → ~$27.50 EPC at 5%. E-bike Current Plus ~$3,299 → ~$165 EPC. E-bike content remains ~6× more valuable per conversion for affiliate creators.
strengths: Unique belt-drive low-maintenance positioning — strong repeatable content hook for lifestyle, commuter, and parent creators
Same-day shipping + 7-day customer support = conversion-positive proof points for affiliate content
30-day return policy reduces buyer hesitation — easy affiliate recommendation
Affirm financing expands addressable buyer pool on higher-ticket e-bikes
AvantLink is a trusted, fraud-resistant network with deep-link and product-feed tooling
Costco Next listing signals mainstream brand credibility
Yazing secondary platform adds affiliate discovery surface
weaknesses: 21-day cookie stagnant across 6 consecutive audit cycles — zero improvement signal since at least mid-2024
5% flat commission — no tiered, performance-bonus, or seasonal rate structure ever detected
No self-serve creative library; custom asset requests require direct Priority team contact
Single primary network (AvantLink) limits organic affiliate discovery
E-bike high-AOV/EPC opportunity absent from visible affiliate recruitment messaging
opportunities: PEAK SPRING WINDOW: April 23 — core spring buying season still active. Affiliate content live NOW captures remaining April/May demand; window closes late May
E-bike EPC: Current Plus at $3,299 × 5% = ~$165 EPC — among highest in DTC bike affiliate space; primary content angle
Travel/lifestyle content via hotel partnerships (Starwood, Nantucket) — underexploited by affiliate creators
Urban car-free lifestyle content — belt-drive narrative resonates with commuter and sustainability audiences
Kids bike segment — rust/grease-free belt drive is a unique safety/zero-maintenance pitch for parent channels
Comparison content (Priority vs. Rad Power, Aventon, Velowave) drives high-intent organic traffic
threats: Velowave (7-10% / 60-day cookie) and Velotric (7% / 30-day) offer materially better affiliate economics in e-bike segment
Aventon (4% / 30-day) and Rad Power Bikes (5% / 30-day) match or beat Priority on cookie at comparable commission
Costco Next listing creates price-comparison bypass risk for affiliate link attribution
Six consecutive cycles of stagnation signals low affiliate channel investment priority — escalating creator attention flight risk toward higher-paying programs
No spring 2026 promotional rate, bonus window, or creative campaign detected — missed peak seasonal amplification for 6th consecutive Priority audit

changes_since_last_audit.change_summary: No changes detected. Commission (5%), cookie (21 days), networks (AvantLink / Yazing), AOV ($550+), payment terms, and all program structure are fully unchanged from the 2026-04-21 audit. Both program page URLs (/pages/affiliate-program-1 and /pages/affiliate-program) remain live with consistent content. Program has been static with no modifications since at least mid-2024.
changes_since_last_audit.program_stability: high — zero rate changes, network additions, creative library launches, seasonal promotions, or structural modifications across all tracked 2026 audit cycles

benchmark_update.notes: bicycles_dtc benchmarks remain accurate. All sources confirm 5% commission / 21-day cookie consistent with current benchmark values. No update to category-benchmarks.json required this cycle.

recommended_actions: ESCALATE COOKIE CONCERN (6th cycle): Six consecutive audits at 21 days vs. 30-day category standard with zero movement — recommend immediate formal outreach to Priority affiliate contact requesting a cookie extension as condition of continued LiveChannel creator partnership support
PEAK SEASON — ACT NOW: April 23 — prime spring buying window still open but closing. LiveChannel vendors should have affiliate content live immediately to capture April/May demand
E-bike content priority: Current Plus ~$3,299 at 5% = ~$165 EPC — coach creators to lead with e-bike content over standard bikes; standard line EPC (~$27.50) is thin for effort invested

Competitive rebalance consideration: Velowave (7-10%/60-day) and Velotric (7%/30-day) offer structurally superior affiliate economics for e-bike-focused creators — evaluate rebalancing creator partner recommendations toward these programs
Monitor AvantLink dashboard for any spring 2026 promotional rate, bonus period, or creative asset drop — none detected across six consecutive 2026 Priority audit cycles to date
